title: ilex fargesii subsp. fargesii
intro: Ilex fargesii subsp. fargesii, also known as Farges' holly, is a plant species within the Ilex genus, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine, attributed with medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting cardiovascular well-being. Farges' holly is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and capsules, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
